mapper.insert: insert into idempotent_request( biz_type, idempotent_key, biz_id, request_hash, status, result_ref_type, result_ref_id, error_message, create_by, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{bizType}, #{idempotentKey}, #{bizId}, #{requestHash}, #{status}, #{resultRefType}, #{resultRefId}, #{errorMessage}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update: update idempotent_request set status = 'SUCCESS', result_ref_type = #{resultRefType}, result_ref_id = #{resultRefId}, error_message = null, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId}
update idempotent_request set status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId}
